targets.name: ArgumentArity
targets.notes: Informal spec extracted. 14 properties across 4 groups. Open question: constructor does not enforce Min <= Max. Next: Task 3 (Lean 4 formal spec). 5 predefined constants all decidable.

targets.name: CommandLineParser.TryUnescape
targets.notes: Pure inner function. Single/double quote unescaping. Security-relevant.

targets.name: CommandLineParser.ParseOptionAndSeparators
targets.notes: Pure inner function. Splits --opt=val into name+arg. Strips leading dashes.

open_prs.title: [Lean Squad] feat: formal verification infrastructure — research & CI automation

next_priority: Task 3: Write Lean 4 formal spec for ArgumentArity (types + theorem stubs with sorry, attempt decide proofs for predefined constants)

approach.rationale: Pure functions, clear algebraic properties, well-documented POSIX/CLI conventions

findings.description: Constructor does not enforce Min <= Max invariant. Ill-formed arities silently accepted. ValidateOptionsArgumentArity may produce misleading error messages for Min > Max inputs.
